textByHash.12b08b3accc155b17f8eab93ad470078287ca60f: of trade network with forty of his friends. A 'treasure trove', he claims. I'll believe it when I see it.
textByHash.26537886c6847c79aa989ee572ea07961619d709: that our problems are at a manageable size.
textByHash.270be286d9525c41627fc08153ec6c98c7fadce3: Oh, that Ali! Well, er, your best bet is to ask around town. I'm sure someone will know what he's up to.
textByHash.326b917b576ad2dfcb0fe667f230086008ef93dd: I really can't chat for very long, the recent escalation in crime has me run off my feet. Just a short while ago even my own house was robbed. This cannot continue.
textByHash.32d05849919400b5acc85d26a0dede0e008152ee: All are welcome here. Now more than ever I suppose.
textByHash.39c5449b233c3c80795ba5bb3433e33063357934: I hope that helps you in your quest. If you speak to Ali Morrisane, do tell him that I wholeheartedly apologise for the way he - er, his family - has been treated.
textByHash.3e7e328cfddfe4a6e6b7e7b042bfb5203ef9c44f: Once he angered the Menaphites and the bandits, I knew I could no longer protect him.
textByHash.4056e7ff474bf3bbb75d1778b998ecf99c2d854b: Now, how would a passing adventurer know where to find my missing jewels?
textByHash.4cecd943d31409006781c04464867ea44cf1e084: My thanks, adventurer. Your methods and motives may be questionable, but none can argue that you have delivered our little town from the wicked gangs who plagued it. I think things will change around here, now
textByHash.5bedc6c5d94123d28bc075715095dc53276acb94: There's trouble in town, and a lot of villagers have left as a result. Things are looking dire.
textByHash.66ef3dc2ef8433b6a1b69133835fdb565fb38b15: Why do I wish that you hadn't said that? Your heavyhanded tactics scare me.
textByHash.6b8bc87910525345d4e77920472a4e1f08971202: He angered a number of people by coercing them into buying things they didn't really want. Completely within the law, of course, but the law could only protect young Ali for so long.
textByHash.77eb08ad1b6ec3fb4a88b0433ecd501b1ab854eb: The least that I can do for you is answer your questions about the whereabouts of Ali Morrisane's nephew. He always was a mischievous young man, full of harebrained schemes.
textByHash.7afaf6b0a7a9b592741041db6b21a4072b8c2a3f: Perhaps you should! I'm sure he's keen to hear word of his nephew.
textByHash.9239beeaad12f31127fec83688395fd08fff1039: Well, the consequences of your little piece of butchery are that the town is now even worse off. The bandits no longer have to waste time and energy fighting with the Menaphites and can direct all their attention
textByHash.9520cffcbc1b219d3ea25cb6eb596db991b0ebb4: He dreamed of being the greatest salesman in all of Gielinor! Unfortunately, he was a little too good.
textByHash.a14429eb89d752d02783f8fbbdf9c411f62f48a7: Under cover of darkness I smuggled him out of the town, and he's been gone ever since.
textByHash.b493fb58436f79c924036294fa32804bf2ca66bf: Welcome, adventurer, to the town of Pollnivneach, the gateway to Menaphos and Al Kharid. My name is Ali and I'm the mayor of this town. I hope you enjoy your stay here.
textByHash.b737be5cc0b3681ac9afa899007702ba870130f3: I can assure you, however, that he is safe and well - and now that you have effectively ended the threat posed by the gangs, he can continue his business elsewhere. Last I heard he planned to open some kind
textByHash.b9b75ae8ed2194964a098f1eac9be189447f1974: Do you understand the concept of consequences?
textByHash.bb7223aca7256d85433c941eecdf780c996037b4: I don't know what we did to deserve your presence here, but I for one am filled with regret.
textByHash.c1b5696e79ec726ef107a516969f4fcc2bf27ad9: I really can't chat for very long, the recent escalation in crime has me run off my feet. There are muggings and burglaries happening in broad daylight! It's really not on.
textByHash.f81be5d8fc54d323099e292d30101023b927af04: Thank you once again. Have you spoken to Ali Morrisane yet?
textByHash.fa21c803283d3e4837748457e940d7f07313afc7: towards making us miserable. So for your efforts I thank you, but I wish no-one had asked for your help.
